title: cyclosorus multifrons
intro: Cyclosorus multifrons, also known as the multilobed cyclosorus or multilobed Chinese fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cyclosorus multifrons include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often dried and then made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness their medicinal properties.
